definition: Countries working together to solve global problems.
example: Like all school classes following the same school rules.
Like students helping classmates finish a group project.

definition: Shared rules countries agree to follow.
example: Like school rules everyone must obey.

definition: A big meeting of world leaders.
example: Like a school assembly with all students.
Like a student council making school decisions.
Like teachers agreeing on the same homework rules.

definition: A deal made by many countries.
example: Like the whole class agreeing on project rules.

definition: A decision made by many countries together.
example: Like a class vote.
Like school rules for using the library.

definition: Countries guiding others on world issues.
example: Like a class leader organizing a project.

definition: Being open and honest in decisions.
example: Like explaining why a teacher gave a certain grade.
Like students answering for breaking rules.
Like teachers checking homework.
Like students planning a group event.

definition: Working together to solve world issues.
example: Like classmates fixing a group project problem.
Like a school handbook.
Like grading systems in school.
Like the whole class cleaning the classroom.
Like different school clubs organizing an event.

definition: The structure used to make world decisions.
example: Like school administration making school policies.
Like the whole class agreeing on a field trip.
